prompt: Using the provided reference image as a layout and style guide, recreate it as a vintage Chinese mythological illustrated story page instead of the Monkey King page. Keep the aged textbook/comic print look, yellowed paper texture, retro ink-and-watercolor rendering, and boxed multi-panel composition. Replace the original content with a 山海经-themed page. Preserve the vertical title block on the left, but change the main title to {argument name="title text" default="山海经"}. Build a total of 8 content panels: 1 large title/hero panel at the top left featuring a mythic figure and a red sun, 5 medium boxed narrative panels in the middle rows with different ancient myth scenes, and 2 wide horizontal panels across the bottom row. Add dense Chinese explanatory captions under each panel in the same old-print style, with small numbered labels for panels 2 through 8 and a small red seal-like tag near the title. The overall result should feel like an antique Chinese serialized picture-book page from a retro children’s mythology encyclopedia.
translatedPrompt: 以提供的参考图像为布局和风格指南，将其重构为一页复古中国神话插画故事页，而非原有的孙悟空页面。保持陈旧的教科书/漫画印刷外观、泛黄的纸张纹理、复古水墨渲染以及多格漫画排版。将原始内容替换为以《山海经》为主题的页面。保留左侧的竖排标题栏，但将主标题更改为 {argument name="title text" default="山海经"}。共构建 8 个内容面板：左上方设 1 个大型标题/主图面板，展示神话人物和红日；中间行设 5 个中型叙事面板，展示不同的古代神话场景；底部行设 2 个宽幅横向面板。在每个面板下方添加密集的中文说明文字，保持旧式印刷风格，并为第 2 至第 8 个面板添加小型编号标签，在标题附近添加一个小型的红色印章式标签。最终效果应呈现出一种复古儿童神话百科全书中连环画页面的质感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 《山海经》复古漫画页面：此提示词可将参考的古董漫画排版转换为全新的复古中国神话页面，适用于生成具有相同结构和印刷美感的替代性教育绘本页面。
breakdown.subject: 信息结构
breakdown.bestUse: 知识卡片、科普图、社媒长图、教学材料

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 信息图/图解 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: vintage, retro, watercolor]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
